en.name: Level 39 — Enchanted Forest
en.shortDescription: A finite circular forest of twisting dirt paths locked in twilight, inducing nostalgia and a hypnotic calm that tempts dangerously long stays.
en.atmosphere: Perpetual dusk over sparse ancient oaks, cool and unnaturally tranquil yet disorienting, pulling the mind toward inaction.
en.tips: Drink Almond Water to break the hypnotic effect. Don't linger near the center. Navigate by the paths and beware the Border's harsh weather.
